zh.Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Annesley於1364年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾安斯利時，他的父親Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 141024歲，母親Agnes de Clifton28歲。他於1376年11月與Benedicta de Babington在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1423年9月13日在英國諾廷加姆爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Annesley于1364年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾安斯利时，他的父亲Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 141024岁，母亲Agnes de Clifton28岁。他于1376年11月与Benedicta de Babington在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1423年9月13日在英国諾廷加姆爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Annesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ansley
meanings: habitational name from such places as Ansley in Warwickshire or Annesley in Nottinghamshire. The former is named with Old English ānsetl ‘hermitage’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; the latter with an Old English personal name An (‘the solitary one’) + lēah. In North America, the surname may in some cases also be an altered form of Scottish Ainslie . Compare Ainsley .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Annesley was born in 1364, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410, was 24 and his mother, Agnes de Clifton, was 28. He married Benedicta de Babington in November 1376, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 September 1423, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Annesley est né en 1364, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Clifton, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Benedicta de Babington en novembre 1376, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 septembre 1423, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Annesley 1364 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 24 und seine Mutter Agnes de Clifton 28. Er hat im November 1376 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Benedicta de Babington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. September 1423 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Annesley è nato il nel 1364 nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Clifton, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Benedicta de Babington nel novembre 1376, nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 settembre 1423, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Annesleyが1364年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410は24歳，母Agnes de Cliftonは28歳であった。1376年11月にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーでBenedicta de Babingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1423年9月13日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Annesley(이)가 1364년 영국 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Clifton(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1376년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 Benedicta de Babington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1423년 9월 13일 영국 노틴그함실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Annesley nasceu em 1364, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Clifton, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Benedicta de Babington em novembro de 1376, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1423, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Annesley родился в 1364 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Clifton, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Benedicta de Babington ноябрь 1376 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 сентября 1423 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Annesley nació en 1364, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Agnes de Clifton, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Benedicta de Babington en noviembre de 1376, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1423, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
